meaning: n.震动,颤抖,箭袋,箭袋中的箭vi.颤抖,振动,射中vt.使颤动adj.敏捷的
examples: Jane couldn't help the quiver in her voice.
He sat down on a large mushroom, and now there was a quiver in his voice.
He felt a quiver of excitement run through him.
The drought in the region has been so severe that quiver trees are struggling to survive.
Chris was a nervous man, and as he spoke, his whole face seemed to quiver.
